FILE_CONTENT.TEXT:
############################################################## # Helper class to help porting code using JS object notation: # # JS: var obj = {type: "unknown"} # JS: obj.type = "analog" # # PY: obj = JsObject({"type" : "unknown"}) # PY: obj.type = "analog" # class JsObject(dict): def __init__(self, d): for k in d.keys(): setattr(self, k, d[k])
############################################################## # Map value from one range to another # def js_map(x, inMin, inMax, outMin, outMax): return (x - inMin) * (outMax - outMin) / (inMax - inMin) + outMin

############################################################## # Helper class to help porting code using JS object notation: # # JS: var obj = {type: "unknown"} # JS: obj.type = "analog" # # PY: obj = JsObject({"type" : "unknown"}) # PY: obj.type = "analog" # class JsObject(dict): def __init__(self, d): for k in d.keys(): setattr(self, k, d[k])
############################################################## # Map value from one range to another # def js_map(x, inMin, inMax, outMin, outMax): return (x - inMin) * (outMax - outMin) / (inMax - inMin) + outMin

THING_MODEL.SPECIFICATIONS:
Home Speaker
Play sounds.

Features:
  • Registration Server Compatible
  • Analog input from 0 to 1023 converted to predefined sounds.
  • Sets a SOUND_dB property in itself for the sound level.
Usage:
  • Plays different sounds based on the analog input value.  Can be checked for the sound property SOUND_dB by sensors to detect sound occurring.
Direct Control:
  • N/A 
Local Control:
  • Connect device to MCU. Use the "analogWrite" API per Data Specifications
Remote Control:
  • N/A
Data Specifications:
Input Slot A0: [value range 0-1023]

Example:
Connect Potentiometer to Home Speaker. Turn the knob to play three different sounds.
